title: Ismael Sanchez Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ismael Sanchez Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ismael Sanchez
Undergraduate Student
BS in Cybersecurity
Northeastern Alumni in the Family
Initially drawn to Northeastern by his family’s connection to the university, Ismael Sanchez’s curiosity was ignited when he discovered Khoury College’s cybersecurity program. Now, through co-ops and mentorship, he’s being encouraged to explore and deepen his passion for the field.
If you want to do the switch to cyber, you’re at the right school. … These other schools, they give you the four-year degree, but they don’t give you the experience. And Northeastern gives you the experience
Ismael Sanchez, BSCY
Explore all Khoury Stories
